channel.title: GitHub Scala Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Scala in GitHub

item.title: lichess-org/lila
item.description: ♞ lichess.org: the forever free, adless and open source chess server ♞

item.title: apache/spark
item.description: Apache Spark - A unified analytics engine for large-scale data processing

item.title: OpenXiangShan/XiangShan
item.description: Open-source high-performance RISC-V processor

item.title: open-korean-text/open-korean-text
item.description: Open Korean Text Processor - An Open-source Korean Text Processor

item.title: apache/incubator-livy
item.description: Apache Livy is an open source REST interface for interacting with Apache Spark from anywhere.

item.title: delta-io/delta
item.description: An open-source storage framework that enables building a Lakehouse architecture with compute engines including Spark, PrestoDB, Flink, Trino, and Hive and APIs

item.title: rtyley/bfg-repo-cleaner
item.description: Removes large or troublesome blobs like git-filter-branch does, but faster. And written in Scala

item.title: twitter/the-algorithm
item.description: Source code for Twitter's Recommendation Algorithm

item.title: chipsalliance/rocket-chip
item.description: Rocket Chip Generator

item.title: broadinstitute/cromwell
item.description: Scientific workflow engine designed for simplicity & scalability. Trivially transition between one off use cases to massive scale production environments

item.title: scala/scala
item.description: Scala 2 compiler and standard library. Scala 2 bugs at https://github.com/scala/bug; Scala 3 at https://github.com/scala/scala3

item.title: digital-asset/daml
item.description: The Daml smart contract language

item.title: ucb-bar/chipyard
item.description: An Agile RISC-V SoC Design Framework with in-order cores, out-of-order cores, accelerators, and more

item.title: typelevel/cats-effect
item.description: The pure asynchronous runtime for Scala

item.title: apache/carbondata
item.description: High performance data store solution

item.title: sbt/sbt
item.description: sbt, the interactive build tool

item.title: firesim/firesim
item.description: FireSim: Fast and Effortless FPGA-accelerated Hardware Simulation with On-Prem and Cloud Flexibility

item.title: apache/kyuubi
item.description: Apache Kyuubi is a distributed and multi-tenant gateway to provide serverless SQL on data warehouses and lakehouses.
